horoscope: There can be some confusion surrounding facts and figures or increased sensitivity today, dear Aries, with Neptune stationing and turning retrograde. While this is due to the shift, the retrograde cycle itself lasts until December 12th and is a good time for detaching yourself just enough from your ideals and dreams to gain a new perspective on them. While you may lose some wind in your sails just for now, this cycle can ultimately bring about more balance in your life. Be particularly vigilant and kind to yourself this week if you feel some loss of energy or motivation, but in the coming months, you'll benefit from this cycle that gives you a chance to see your dreams in a new light. Today, observe what you've been missing or overlooking, particularly related to nonmaterial, soul needs. You might recognize the need to make some adjustments. Today, your approach is a little more confident than usual, and you're more inclined to assert your opinions and share your ideas.

There is not a lot of clarity to the day's energies, dear Taurus, which can trip you up if you choose to push for answers. Winding down is best, if possible, since Neptune stations and turns retrograde and the Moon spends the day in your privacy sector. Ultimately, these things can redirect you along a more empowering path. It's better to let things flow so that you can observe and determine your next move intuitively. Neptune will be retrograde until December 12th, and during this yearly cycle, you get the chance for some level of peace about a disappointment from the past. Neptune's station can make it hard to concentrate today, however, and you could feel as if you're faltering. Still, you might notice where you've lacked inspiration. It will be your mission to reconnect with what inspires you going forward. Today, you may prefer to keep a low profile, catch up on rest, or take more time to yourself. It can be a good time to say no to demanding situations or other extras in your life, if possible.

With Neptune turning retrograde today, dear Gemini, you may be feeling a little lazy or lacking in direction. Faith can temporarily falter. There may be some confused situations or a bubble-bursting moment now, particularly surrounding a long-term dream or friendship, but this is temporary. During this retrograde cycle until December 12th, you will get back in touch with your dreams, possibly refining them to better suit your purposes and current situation. As well, friendships will resume with renewed faith, again possibly with refinements. If you're feeling emotionally stuck in one place, allow yourself extra time to figure things out before moving forward. Some time for reflection can be very helpful now.

Neptune stations and turns retrograde today, dear Cancer, and your feelings about your career path or reputation are shifting. This is not meant to lead you astray, but rather to first prompt you to question your goals and ultimately strengthen them. What feels like a lack of direction can work in your favor as you learn what you truly want. Neptune’s retrograde station is a yearly event, and its retrograde cycle lasts about five months. It’s an important time for self-understanding. Aim to dig deep to discover your true calling. Today, try not to take a scattered approach to handling your chores or responsibilities, as this can only serve to up anxiety levels. With today's Moon, you might decide that performing well for yourself first and foremost is most satisfying and can free you up for more enjoyment later.

Take your time coming to conclusions today, dear Leo, as Neptune stations and turns retrograde. Keep in mind that situations can appear more complicated than they are, so give yourself time. Until December 12th, you'll be realigning with beliefs and pursuits that reflect your current growth. There can be some confusion during the shift itself, and possibly a disappointment, but it can lead to a better position overall if you use it as a learning experience. A minor crisis of faith in a belief system, educational path, or project may arise this week. Much has been going on behind the scenes and in your inner world lately. If you've ignored your own needs, then you're now awakening to desires you've neglected. It's best to treat today with gentleness and sensitivity. You need some extra inspiration, and it will be your mission to find it, and the process can't be rushed! It's a time for broadening your perspective.

Neptune stations and turns retrograde today, dear Virgo, and will continue its retrograde until December 12th. This shift can be somewhat confusing for your understanding of relationships, support, or financial matters this week. However, the cycle itself is highly useful for gaining a perspective on these matters. You may be exploring dreams, motivations, and spiritual needs as you look at these matters from a slightly more detached position. If there is a letdown or lull experienced this week, know that it's temporary and can help redirect you along a more appropriate and empowering path. Today is favorable for expressing yourself creatively and finding new ways to convey your inner message.

This can be a time to step out of circulation for a bit, if possible, dear Libra, with Neptune turning retrograde today. The shift occurring today can be a little confusing, but the yearly cycle, lasting until December 12th, is good for learning about your dreams and ideals. Today's station can call to mind an important relationship, past or present, and the need for a new perspective on your own relationship needs or a person in your life. It's important to let things flow more naturally so that you can tap into this energy. You may need to revise your outlook or approach. Eventually, this cycle will reveal the right path. If you experience a temporary lull or a loss of faith in a dream this week, it can prompt important introspection as you get in touch with what you honestly want from a person or a relationship. Boundaries can be a big issue, and you may have let people cross them a little too much recently. If so, you're inclined to notice it in the months ahead. Today favors creative thinking rather than precision. You can experience some odd yearnings and conflicting desires.

It's important not to overbook today, dear Scorpio, even with the Moon in your work and health sector all day, which tends to keep you on your toes. You're geared up to solve problems, but there can be some mystery or confusion to the day with Neptune turning retrograde. With Neptune beginning its five-plus-month retrograde cycle, there can be some temporary lack of direction or a reason to pull yourself back from a dream or plan to get some perspective. This may come in the form of a minor letdown related to work, service, or health areas, but it can redirect you along a more authentic path. If your daily life has been chaotic, you’ll feel some of the consequences this week, and this can prompt you to reconsider some of your recent pursuits or plans. Keep in mind that problem areas may feel bigger than life temporarily as they draw your attention to what’s missing. The retrograde cycle itself, lasting until December 12th, is strong for gathering intel. Desires and impulses can be confusing or even misleading today with Neptune's retrograde turn. It's not the best time to see yourself, and especially your work or health, in a clear light, so aim to take things easy for now.

Neptune stations retrograde today, dear Sagittarius, and will spend the coming five-plus months in retrograde motion. There may be a small disappointment now that ultimately works in your favor as it fuels you to make changes. There can be a natural need to step back just a little from certain creative or romantic pursuits to gain perspective. As you let things flow, you'll gain a stronger idea of which of your dreams and pursuits are genuinely worth your time and energy. Today, you may not be feeling on solid ground with confusing energies around you. You could experience a dip in motivation, which can signal that you need to look for a different source of inspiration. Take things easy, be gentle with yourself and others, and trust that you'll ultimately feel stronger. It's a time to make observations and adjustments rather than jump into action. Today's Neptune station is confusing, but its yearly retrograde cycle, lasting until December 12th, is useful for gaining perspective through a bit of detachment.

There can be some feelings of being scattered or undirected today, dear Capricorn, but overall, this is a good time for checking in with yourself and enjoying the benefits and healing properties of some familiarity. Neptune is stationing as it turns retrograde, and the shift itself can be a little disorienting. However, the retrograde cycle, lasting until December 12th, is excellent for gaining perspective. In the coming months, you'll be able to see which of your goals and plans, mainly related to family and home life, are doable, need refinements, or are better off left behind you. Pulling back from some projects or dreams can be strategic. Give yourself extra time to think, imagine, and reflect, and as you advance, aim to pay more attention to your spiritual or imaginative side.

There can be a somewhat disoriented feel to the day, dear Aquarius, with Neptune turning retrograde. Neptune's retrograde until December 12th is a yearly one, and this year, it spends all of its time in the sector of your chart that rules facts and figures and the lower mind. Fuzzy thinking is likely for the time being. Perceptions can be confused and unsure, but you might also be dealing with mixed signals or conflicting communications or instructions. Information you're receiving is not necessarily factual, and when it is, you may not have the desire to focus on facts and figures. A small disappointment is possible, perhaps with a neighbor, sibling, or acquaintance, or a special interest or educational matter. However, whatever brings you down will ultimately be for your own good, as it gets you in touch with the fantasies and dreams that serve you well, as well as those that may need to be refined or thrown out. Allow for more time to get things done, or take a lighter schedule if possible.

Neptune is at a standstill today, dear Pisces, as it turns retrograde for more than five months, making it wise to find ways to unwind and let go of tension. While the shift this week can be mildly confusing, the retrograde cycle itself, which lasts until December 12th, helps you out. There can be more rethinking, introspection, and perhaps some indecision about business or money matters, leading to a new perspective. Ultimately, you’re seeking inspiration, and if you’ve been sourcing it from the wrong places, a redirection might be in order now. It’s a great time to explore your dreams and ideals and examine whether you connect with them as you pursue worldly affairs. Events occurring now can serve as a reminder to get in touch with what may be missing from your life, particularly on spiritual or emotional levels.
